headline: Sarawak Autonomy Bill Passes State Assembly Unanimously
context: Sarawak State Assembly passed the State Rights Enforcement Bill 2026 with all 82 seats voting in favour on March 10.

cards.big: All 82 Sarawak assemblymen voted for autonomy enforcement bill
cards.sub: Bill gives Sarawak legal tools to enforce MA63 rights unilaterally

cards.big: Bill allows Sarawak to withhold federal revenue collection from April 2027
cards.sub: Finance Ministry warned it could trigger constitutional crisis if enforced

cards.big: GPS coalition holds 28 of 31 Sarawak parliamentary seats federally
cards.sub: Premier Abang Johari leveraged coalition weight to preempt opposition

cards.big: Attorney General Chambers flagged 3 clauses as potentially unconstitutional
cards.sub: Sarawak state AG countered with 1963 Malaysia Agreement precedent arguments

cards.big: Unanimous passage signals whether state rights can be enforced against federal inertia
82 unanimous votes signal that autonomy is no longer negotiable for Sarawak's political class.
